items.title: 3 Button Herald Power 31.8k Realistic
items.rotation:
Make sure your facet of nature (F2 skill) is active.

Opener is 2 sword 2s in Shiro and swap to Jalis.

Make sure you pop impossible odds in Shiro, Vengeful Hammers in Jalis.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity revenant build for fractal/raid/strike content.

Realistic == 10 boons. You have traits that scale with number of boons on you.

items.title: 3 Button Quickness Herald Power 25.2k Realistic
items.rotation:
Make sure your facet of nature (F2 skill) is not active.

You basically just want to try to camp Shiro as much as possible. Swap to Jalis when below 10% and swap back to Shiro ASAP.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity revenant build for fractal/raid/strike content.

Realistic == 10 boons. You have traits that scale with number of boons on you.

It's kinda crap but at least it's very easy and boon uptime is very good. Real benches are like 30-32k ish for this so not much to expect here I guess.

items.title: 3 Button Renegade Condi 30.4k
items.rotation:
Spear 5. Swap legends as much as possible (your traits give conditions on legend swap). Mallyx elite in Mallyx.

Opener is Spear 5 in Kalla, enter combat, swap to Mallyx and proc legend swap traits. Mallyx elite, etc.
items.explanation: This is a beginner/low intensity revenant build for fractal/raid/strike content.

items.title: 5 Button Renegade Condi 33.2k
items.rotation:
Opener is Razorclaw's Rage, Spear 5 in Kalla, enter combat, swap to Mallyx and proc legend swap traits. Mallyx elite.

Rotation is basically spear 5 and cast Citadel Bombardment,  Razorclaw's Rage each once in Kalla and cast Mallyx elite in Mallyx. Swap legends off cooldown.
items.explanation: This is a beginner/low intensity revenant build for fractal/raid/strike content.
